name: gradient_fire_text
description: Flame icon on a fire-toned gradient with 'Space Fire' text overlay below — models the screenshot scenario.

expect.qualitative: Coral-red (#FF6B6B) → amber (#F59E0B) diagonal gradient, white local_fire_department flame centered upper-mid, 'Space Fire' label cleanly readable in the lower band. Should match the user's screenshot mood.
